issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case scenarios.
Assumes brew installation, limiting use to macOS/Linux environments.

scenarios.name: Image scan, severity filter, JSON output
scenarios.rationale: Trivy's CLI is well known so baseline usually constructs the right flags; treatment matches exactly: trivy image --severity CRITICAL,HIGH --format json --output results.json my-app:latest.

scenarios.name: Combined filesystem scan for vuln/secret/misconfig
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often runs separate trivy fs and trivy config calls or misses the --scanners syntax; treatment uses the single documented trivy fs --scanners vuln,secret,misconfig . form.
